violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment to sanitize using 3 bay sink until dishwash has been serviced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025

Several cases of food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC relocated items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the cooler units have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025
The condensate from the 1 door freezer unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety licensed with RIDOH Cener for food protection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024
The hand-washing sink in the dishwash area was lacking paper towels. PIC provided during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024
Hand wash sink in the men's bathroom is lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024
Cheese on prep line was observed not marked with disposal time. PIC placed label with date/disposal time during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024
Two heat lamps were observed not functioning at the time of inspection. PIC replaced during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -gaskets on cold hold unit at rear of cook line -hoods over fry station. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024

The outside dumpster is not covered, side door was observed open during inspection. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Staff closed dumpster during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024
